title: assaylab: validation intelligence for CI
description: assaylab grades test/CI output into a pass/warn/fail verdict: it clusters failures into signatures, assigns a root cause, distinguishes flaky failures from real ones with a learned model, scores per-test risk, and reduces a test suite while emitting a signed, independently re-derivable confidence bound on what was skipped. Contract-compatible with the agentsensory verdict language. MIT-licensed; see https://github.com/amitpatole/assaylab
